notes: The model correctly identifies the CPG 220 independent validation gap and asks a sharp clarifying question before producing the artefact, but because it defers the full artefact pending reply, D2 (no personas), D3 (no MVP), and D4 (no out-of-scope items) are unscored or near-zero, collapsing the weighted total well below the 0.70 threshold — this is a gate-1 response that scores well on process discipline but cannot be evaluated as a complete discovery artefact.
